buy_yes_pricing.evidence: _tracked_open_assets() sets asset_id = yes_token_id for BUY_YES. Market stream tracks YES token. state_hub stores YES token bid as current_price. SSE positions_mark exposes current_price. Frontend uses trade.current_price directly — no bid_yes branching.

buy_no_pricing.evidence: _tracked_open_assets() sets asset_id = no_token_id for BUY_NO. Market stream tracks NO token. state_hub stores NO token bid as current_price. Frontend is blind to side — uses current_price from SSE directly.
buy_no_pricing.sea_tex_incident_recurrence: CANNOT RECUR — frontend has no bid_yes/bid_no branching

unrealized_pnl_sign.evidence: _stream_positions_mark: unrealized_pnl_usd = round((current_price - entry_px) * qty, 4). For BUY_NO, current_price = NO token bid. When NO bid > entry_no → profit positive. When NO bid < entry_no → profit negative. Sign is correct for both sides.
unrealized_pnl_sign.frontend_formula: const unrealizedPct = ((currentHeldPrice - r.entry_px) / r.entry_px) * 100 — derived from SSE current_price only

close_price_truth.evidence: paper_exec.py close_position() uses _fill_price_exit(trade.side, ob) for held side exit. BUY_NO closes at NO token bid (slippage-adjusted). exit_px stored in DB reflects NO-side price. BOS/MIL incident root cause addressed at execution layer by EXECUTION_HELD_SIDE_SEMANTICS_001.
close_price_truth.bos_mil_incident_recurrence: CANNOT RECUR at display layer — exit_px from DB is authoritative

no_shadow_in_live.evidence: Python re.search for #tab-live section: shadow/advisory present = False. Live tab length = 2970 chars. Shadow feed (#shadow-feed) is in .drawer with display:none, not in any tab panel.
no_shadow_in_live.advisory_in_games_tab: PRESENT — class='monitor-trade-box advisory', label='Shadow Advisory — Not Executed'

stale_stream_detection.evidence: SSE positions_mark provides current_price_stale boolean. buildUnifiedPositionCards renders staleBadge = current_price_stale ? 'STALE' : ''. updateLivePositionCardInPlace hides/shows badge via style.display on SSE ticks.

backed_team_display.evidence: buildUnifiedPositionCards: headlineText = r.backed_team ? `${r.backed_team} backed` : 'Backed side'. inferTeamsFromTrade derives backed_team from slug parsing + side. No raw slug on card face.

default_tab.evidence: HTML: <section id=tab-live class=shell-panel active>. Tab button has class=tab-btn active.

mobile_layout.reason: Cannot verify without browser. CSS responsive rules present (480px, 800px breakpoints). Deferred to live session.

trade_log_not_in_live.evidence: #trades-list is in .drawer with display:none. HISTORY tab has #history-list with renderHistoryTab. LIVE tab DOM contains no trade-card elements.

account_strip_always_visible.evidence: .cmdbar is outside .shell-main and .shell-body. It persists across all tab switches. Contains bankroll, open count, committed, win rate.

js_errors.reason: Cannot verify without running browser. No console.log statements present (grep confirmed). No obvious JS errors in code logic. Deferred to live session.

incidents_re_verified.sea_tex: BUY_NO position current_price sourced from NO token bid via state_hub → SSE → current_price field. Frontend uses current_price directly with no side branching. bid_yes absent from dashboard.html. CANNOT RECUR.
incidents_re_verified.bos_mil: BUY_NO close exit_px recorded as NO token bid price via paper_exec._fill_price_exit(side, ob). Display reads from DB. CANNOT RECUR at display layer.
